title: Mica (mineral)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Mica''' was a smooth and shiny mineral that was found in great abundance in the [[Im'g'twe Hills/Legends|Im'g'twe Hills]] on the planet of [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]. Glittering chips of Mica were found to be as strong and as sharp as a razor blade. The young clone known as [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] once used a shard of Mica to defend himself against two attacking [[Massiff/Legends|Massiffs]] shortly before the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]].

[[Gla]] roofs were made from mica.

==Behind the scenes==
[[Wikipedia:Mica|Mica]] is a real-world group of minerals, though its properties are not as advantageous as that found on Geonosis.

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: The Fight to Survive]]''

*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
